arts.ttl: Watch: Arsenal's David Raya makes outrageous double save against Atalanta
arts.sum: Arsenal goalkeeper David Raya makes an unbelievable double save to deny Atalanta BC's Mateo Retegui in their Champions League league phase contest.

arts.ttl: 'That's one of the best saves I have ever seen' David Raya double save for Arsenal vs Atalanta leaves pundits gobsmacked
arts.sum: The Arsenal No1 was on hand to deny Atalanta's Mateo Retegui from the spot before an even better follow up.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres to Arsenal transfer reality emerges amid Sporting Lisbon release clause loophole
arts.sum: When the 2023/2024 season ended and Sporting were crowned champions, Viktor Gyokeres helped by scoring 29 goals. With that said, clubs considering reigniting their interest for Gyokeres in the January transfer window, will have to wait until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: David Raya makes incredible double save from Atalanta penalty as Arsenal goalkeeper keeps scores level in Champions League opener
arts.sum: David Raya produced two moments of brilliance to stop Arsenal going behind in their Champions League opener against Atalanta on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: David Raya pulls off 'one of best saves ever' as Arsenal keeper stuns pundits vs Atalanta
arts.sum: David Raya produced heroics just when Arsenal needed him as he pulled out a stunning save to deny Atalanta star Mateo Retegui during Arsenal's Champions League clash with the Italian side

arts.ttl: Gasperini urges Atalanta ‘humility and ambition’ with Arsenal

arts.ttl: How Arsenal should replace Martin Odegaard in crucial Man City clash
arts.sum: The two heavyweights of the past few seasons are the leading contenders to win the title this time around and the winner of Sunday's meeting between the two will undoubtedly leave the Etihad Stadium feeling good about their chances of lifting the trophy next summer. We might only be entering the fifth gameweek of the season but, given how recent campaigns have played out, there's reason to suggest it's already crunch time for Arsenal and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: William Saliba outlines one thing stopping him from being 'best in the world'
arts.sum: William Saliba believes Arsenal's lack of titles is preventing him from being considered as one of the best centre-backs in the world. They are, however, yet to win a Premier League title after failing to knock Manchester City off the top spot two seasons in a row.
